description: A farmer needs to determine the optimal irrigation schedule for their almond orchard based on soil moisture data and weather forecasts.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest soil moisture readings from in-field sensors.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully retrieves data from all active sensors.

nodes.task_description: Get the 7-day weather forecast, focusing on temperature, humidity, and precipitation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the relevant weather forecast data.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the crop's evapotranspiration (ETc) and recommend an irrigation duration and frequency for the next week.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a precise irrigation schedule in hours and days.
